title: Rebuild 20 Misatos Epic Dodge
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.0 Misato's Epic Dodge             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Fri Dec 24, 2010 1:29 pm How the hell did she dodge so fast when that gun turret came flying out of the air? That was epic driving skills.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Fri Dec 24, 2010 1:59 pm The plot required and its not so hard to dodge like that in real life, only diference is in real life you would soon loose control of the car and either hit the side wall or flip the car as you loose control.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Dec 24, 2010 2:13 pm Misato is badass that is all

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Dec 24, 2010 4:13 pm Xard wrote: Misato is badass that is all

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Dec 24, 2010 8:38 pm Xard wrote: Misato is badass that is all

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Dec 24, 2010 10:26 pm that's how she rolls.
